summary: Iteration 4: Tested new admin Code Quality Status page (/quality). All features working correctly - sidebar navigation, page rendering, data-testid elements, refresh button, and auth protection.
critical_code_review_comments: QualityPage.tsx: Well-structured with proper TypeScript interfaces and data-testid attributes
Sidebar.tsx: Quality link correctly added with ClipboardCheck icon
Backend /api/v1/quality/status: Returns valid structured data with checks, reviewCycles, and metrics
Auth protection intact - LoginGate correctly blocks unauthenticated access to /quality
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quality page fully functional. All 5 test features verified: (1) Quality nav link visible and clickable in sidebar, (2) /quality page renders with all data-testid elements, (3) Refresh button reloads data (timestamp updates), (4) Backend /api/v1/quality/status returns valid structured data, (5) Auth protection blocks unauthenticated access.

frontend_ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - credentials work, redirects to dashboard
frontend_ui_tests.auth_protection: PASS - unauthenticated access shows login form
